RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.gas_emission_constants module

class RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.gas_emission_constants.GasEmissionConstants

Bases: object

Constants used in gas emission calculations.

ACHIEVABLE_METHANE_EMISSION = 0.24

Achievable emission of methane (\(CH_4\)) during anaerobic digestion (kg \(CH_4\)/kg VS).

ACTIVATION_ENERGY = 112700.0

Activation energy (joules per mole, J/mol). The activation energy is the minimum energy that must be available to molecules for a reaction to occur.

AMMONIA_EMISSION_COEFFICIENT_IN_OPEN_LOTS = 0.36

Ammonia emission coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in an open lot (unitless).

AMMONIA_EMISSION_COEFFICIENT_WITH_TILLED_BEDDING = 0.5

Ammonia emission coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in a compost bedded pack barn when the bedding is tilled (unitless).

AMMONIA_EMISSION_COEFFICIENT_WITH_UNTILLED_BEDDING = 0.25

Ammonia emission coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in a compost bedded pack barn when the bedding is not tilled (unitless).

CHEN_HASHIMOTO_KINETIC_CONSTANT_KCH = 3.1

Chen-Hashimoto kinetic constant (unitless). This constant is used in the Chen-Hashimoto equation to model the kinetic behaviour of the anaerobic digestion process.

DEFAULT_CARBON_AVAILABLE_IN_BEDDING = 0.35

Default proportion of carbon available in bedding, (unitless, [0, 1]). Default is set to 0.35.

DEFAULT_CARBON_FRACTION_AVAILABLE_IN_BEDDING = 0.35

Default proportion of carbon available in bedding, (unitless, [0, 1]). Default is set to 0.35.

DEFAULT_HOUSING_SPECIFIC_CONSTANT = 260.0

Default housing specific constant (s/m). This constant may be used in calculations related to the housing conditions for animals. Default is set to 260.0 s/m.

DEFAULT_PH_FOR_HOUSING_AMMONIA = 7.7

Default pH for housing ammonia (unitless). Default is set to 7.7.

DEFAULT_PH_FOR_STORAGE_AMMONIA = 7.5

Default pH for storage ammonia (unitless). Default is set to 7.5.

DEFAULT_SLURRY_STORAGE_TEMPERATURE = 15.0

Default slurry storage temperature (\(^{\circ}C\)). Default is set to 15.0.

DEFAULT_STORAGE_AREA_PER_ANIMAL = 1.0

Default storage area per animal (\(m^2\)). Default is set to 1.0.

DEFAULT_VOLATILE_SOLIDS_FRACTION = 0.68

Default volatile solids fraction, (unitless, [0, 1]). This is the fraction of total solids that are volatile Default is set to 0.68.

DEGRADABLE_VOLATILE_SOLIDS_RATE_CORRECTING_FACTOR = 1.0

Rate correcting factor for degradable volatile solids, used in calculation of slurry storage methane emission (unitless).

FRACTION_OF_HANDLED_MANURE = 0.9

Fraction of manure handled by the manure management system (unitless).

GAS_CONSTANT = 8.314

The ideal gas constant (J/mol \(\cdot\) K).

GENERAL_LOWER_BOUND_TEMPERATURE = -40.0

General temperature lower bound (\(^{\circ}C\)). Default is set to -40.0.

GENERAL_UPPER_BOUND_TEMPERATURE = 60.0

General temperature upper bound (\(^{\circ}C\)). Default is set to 60.0.

LEACHING_COEFFICIENT = 0.035

Leaching coefficient used in the calculation of nitrogen loss in a compost bedded pack barn (unitless).

LIQUID_MANURE_HSC = 4.1

Housing specific constant for liquid manure (s/m).

MCF_CONSTANT_A = 7.11

Parameter estimate (unitless) of a regression using IPCC data (2006) used in the Methane Conversion Factor (MCF) calculation. This coefficient scales the exponential function of ambient barn temperature.

MCF_CONSTANT_B = 0.0884

Parameter estimate (unitless) of a regression using IPCC data (2006) used in the Methane Conversion Factor (MCF) calculation. This exponent coefficient determines the rate at which MCF increases with ambient barn temperature.

METHANE_CONVERSION_FACTOR = 0.79

Methane conversion factor (unitless).

METHANE_DENSITY = 0.657

Methane density (kg/\(m^3\)).

METHANE_EMISSION_COEFFICIENT = 24

Methane emission coefficient, used in calculation of slurry storage methane emission (unitless).

METHANE_ENERGY_DENSITY = 55.0

Methane energy density (megajoules per kg, MJ/kg). This is the amount of energy stored per unit mass of methane.

METHANE_FACTOR = 0.67

Unit conversion factor for methane from \(m^3\) to kg (unitless).

METHANE_POTENTIAL_Go = 240.0

Methane potential (mL/g). Default is set to 240.0.

NATURAL_LOG_ARRHENIUS_CONSTANT = 43.33

Natural log of the Arrhenius constant (unitless).

NITROUS_OXIDE_COEFFICIENT_IN_OPEN_LOTS = 0.02

Nitrous oxide coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in an open lot (unitless).

NITROUS_OXIDE_COEFFICIENT_WITH_TILLED_BEDDING = 0.07

Nitrous oxide coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in a compost bedded pack barn when the bedding is tilled (unitless).

NITROUS_OXIDE_COEFFICIENT_WITH_UNTILLED_BEDDING = 0.01

Nitrous oxide coefficient used for calculating nitrogen loss in a compost bedded pack barn when the bedding is not tilled (unitless).

NON_DEGRADABLE_VOLATILE_SOLIDS_RATE_CORRECTING_FACTOR = 0.01

Rate correcting factor for non-degradable volatile solids, used in calculation of slurry storage methane emission (unitless).

OXYGEN_HALF_SATURATION_CONSTANT = 0.02

The half saturation constant of Oxygen gas (O2)

POTENTIAL_METHANE_YIELD_OF_MANURE = 0.48

Potential methane yield of manure, (kg \(CH_4\)/kg VS). This represents the potential amount of methane that can be produced per kilogram of volatile solids (VS) in manure. Default is set to 0.48.

SLURRY_MANURE_HSC = 19.0

Housing specific constant for slurry manure (s/m).

SLURRY_MANURE_THRESHOLD = 5.0

Dry matter threshold for classifying slurry manure (unitless).

SOLID_AND_SEMI_SOLID_MANURE_HSC = 10.0

Housing specific constant for solid and semi-solid manure (s/m).

SOLID_MANURE_THRESHOLD = 8.0

Dry matter threshold for classifying solid and semi-solid manure (unitless).

SPECIFIC_GROWTH_RATE = 0.637

Specific growth rate (:math:`mu`m). This represents the rate at which the microbial population in the anaerobic digestion process increases.

RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.manure_constants module

class RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.manure_constants.ManureConstants

Bases: object

A class to store constants for manure management.

COMPOST_BEDDING_INORGANIC_NITROGEN_AMMONIUM_FRACTION = 0.5

The fraction of inorganic nitrogen in compost bedding that is ammonium (unitless, [0, 1]). Default is set to 0.5.

COMPOST_BEDDING_ORGANIC_NITROGEN_FRACTION = 0.952

The fraction of organic nitrogen in compost bedding (unitless, [0, 1]). Default is set to 0.952.

DEFAULT_CARBON_FRACTION_AVAILABLE_IN_MANURE = 0.5

Default proportion of carbon available in manure, (unitless, [0, 1]). Default is set to 0.5.

DEFAULT_DAYS_SINCE_LAST_TILLAGE = 1

Default number of days since last tillage used in the calculation of the carbon decomposition rate (days). Default is set to 1.

DEFAULT_LAG_TIME = 2

Default lag time used in the calculation of the carbon decomposition rate (days). Default is set to 2.

DEFAULT_MOISTURE_EFFECT_MICROBIAL_DECOMP = 0.65

The effect of moisture on microbial decomposition.

EFFECTIVE_MICROBIAL_DECOMP_RATE = 0.00237

The effectiveness of microbial decomposition rate (unitless).

LIQUID_MANURE_DENSITY = 990.0

The density of liquid manure (kg/\(m^3\)).

MANURE_DENSITY = 990.0

The density of manure (kg/\(m^3\)).

MANURE_SOLIDS_BEDDING_DENSITY = 400.0

The density of manure solids bedding (kg/\(m^3\)).

SLURRY_MANURE_DENSITY = 1400

The density of slurry manure (kg/\(m^3\)).

SOLID_MANURE_DENSITY = 1250

The density of solid manure (kg/\(m^3\)).

TAN_MOLAR_MASS = 17.0306

The molar mass of TAN (g/mol).

UREA_DENSITY = 1.32

The density of urea (g/\(cm^3\)).

UREA_MOLAR_MASS = 60.06

The molar mass of urea (g/mol).

URINE_TAN_FACTOR = 0.45

The factor to convert urine nitrogen to urine total ammoniacal nitrogen (unitless).

RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.units module

class RUFAS.routines.manure.constants_and_units.units.Units

Bases: object

Units for quantities in manure manager output objects.

accumulated_final_manure_volume = 'm^3'
accumulated_sludge_volume = 'm^3'
cleaning_water_volume = 'm^3'
degradable_volatile_solids = 'kg'
final_daily_volume = 'm^3'
final_manure_volume = 'm^3'
final_solids_wet_mass = 'kg'
final_solids_wet_mass_volume = 'm^3'
housing_ammonia = 'kg'
housing_carbon_dioxide = 'kg'
housing_methane = 'kg'
liquid_manure_daily_volume = 'm^3'
liquid_manure_nitrogen = 'kg'
liquid_manure_phosphorus = 'kg'
liquid_manure_potassium = 'kg'
liquid_manure_total_ammoniacal_nitrogen = 'kg'
liquid_manure_total_solids = 'kg'
liquid_manure_total_volatile_solids = 'kg'
manure_degradable_volatile_solids = 'kg'
manure_mass = 'kg'
manure_nitrogen = 'kg'
manure_non_degradable_volatile_solids = 'kg'
manure_phosphorus = 'kg'
manure_potassium = 'kg'
manure_total_ammoniacal_nitrogen = 'kg'
manure_total_solids = 'kg'
manure_urea = 'g_per_L'
manure_urine = 'kg'
manure_volume = 'm^3'
methane = 'kg'
nitrogen = 'kg'
non_degradable_volatile_solids = 'kg'
phosphorus = 'kg'
potassium = 'kg'
sludge_manure_daily_volume = 'm^3'
sludge_manure_nitrogen = 'kg'
sludge_manure_phosphorus = 'kg'
sludge_manure_potassium = 'kg'
sludge_manure_total_solids = 'kg'
sludge_manure_total_volatile_solids = 'kg'
solid_manure_nitrogen = 'kg'
solid_manure_phosphorus = 'kg'
solid_manure_potassium = 'kg'
solid_manure_total_solids = 'kg'
solid_manure_total_volatile_solids = 'kg'
storage_ammonia = 'kg'
storage_methane = 'kg'
temperature = 'C'
total_bedding_volume = 'm^3'
total_daily_manure_volume = 'm^3'
total_solids = 'kg'
total_water_volume_in_milking_center = 'm^3'
urea = 'g_per_L'
urine = 'kg'
urine_nitrogen = 'kg'
urine_total_ammoniacal_nitrogen = 'kg'
